parameters.jsCode:
const f = $json.fields || {};

return [{
  json: {
    recordId: $json.id,
    full_name: f["Full Name"] || "",
    email: f["Email"] || "",
    phone: f["Phone"] || "",
    company: f["Company"] || "",
    preferred_contact_method: f["Preferred Contact Method"] || "",
    inquiry_type: f["Inquiry Type"] || "",
    budget_range: f["Budget Range"] || "",
    urgency_selected: f["Urgency Selected"] || "",
    existing_customer: f["Existing Customer"] || "",
    team_size: f["Team Size"] || "",
    start_timeline: f["Start Timeline"] || "",
    partnership_type: f["Partnership Type"] || "",
    issue_type: f["Issue Type"] || "",
    demo_details: f["Demo Details"] || "",
    current_tool_or_workflow: f["Current Tool or Workflow"] || "",
    biggest_pain_point: f["Biggest Pain Point"] || "",
    preferred_demo_date_or_time: f["Preferred Demo Date or Time"] || "",
    pricing_details: f["Pricing Details"] || "",
    brand_audience_company_details: f["Brand / Audience / Company Details"] || "",
    partnership_goal: f["Partnership Goal"] || "",
    partnership_timeline: f["Partnership Timeline"] || "",
    relevant_link: f["Relevant Link"] || "",
    support_issue_description: f["Support Issue Description"] || "",
    fastest_reach_method: f["Fastest Reach Method"] || "",
    project_description: f["Project Description"] || "",
    features_or_outcome_needed: f["Features or Outcome Needed"] || "",
    expected_project_timeline: f["Expected Project Timeline"] || "",
    reference_links_or_examples: f["Reference Links or Examples"] || "",
    anything_else: f["Anything Else We Should Know"] || ""
  }
}];

parameters.text:
=You are an AI sales assistant for a no-code AI automation service.

Analyze the lead data and return valid JSON only. Do not return markdown. Do not add explanations outside JSON.

Lead details:
Full Name: {{$json.full_name}}
Email: {{$json.email}}
Phone: {{$json.phone}}
Company: {{$json.company}}
Preferred Contact Method: {{$json.preferred_contact_method}}
Inquiry Type: {{$json.inquiry_type}}
Budget Range: {{$json.budget_range}}
Urgency Selected: {{$json.urgency_selected}}
Existing Customer: {{$json.existing_customer}}
Team Size: {{$json.team_size}}
Start Timeline: {{$json.start_timeline}}
Partnership Type: {{$json.partnership_type}}
Issue Type: {{$json.issue_type}}
Demo Details: {{$json.demo_details}}
Current Tool or Workflow: {{$json.current_tool_or_workflow}}
Biggest Pain Point: {{$json.biggest_pain_point}}
Preferred Demo Date or Time: {{$json.preferred_demo_date_or_time}}
Pricing Details: {{$json.pricing_details}}
Brand / Audience / Company Details: {{$json.brand_audience_company_details}}
Partnership Goal: {{$json.partnership_goal}}
Partnership Timeline: {{$json.partnership_timeline}}
Relevant Link: {{$json.relevant_link}}
Support Issue Description: {{$json.support_issue_description}}
Fastest Reach Method: {{$json.fastest_reach_method}}
Project Description: {{$json.project_description}}
Features or Outcome Needed: {{$json.features_or_outcome_needed}}
Expected Project Timeline: {{$json.expected_project_timeline}}
Reference Links or Examples: {{$json.reference_links_or_examples}}
Anything Else We Should Know: {{$json.anything_else}}

Your job:
1. Understand the lead deeply.
2. Fill all CRM-ready fields as well as a customer-ready reply.
3. Use only the information provided. Do not invent facts.
4. If a detail is missing, keep it as an empty string instead of making something up.
5. Keep all outputs professional, useful, and action-oriented.

Create these outputs:

1. ai_summary
- 2 to 4 sentences
- concise but specific
- explain who the lead is, what they want, and the main need

2. ai_intent
- one short clear intent label
- examples: Demo Request, Pricing Inquiry, Partnership, Support, Custom Project

3. ai_urgency
- must be exactly one of: High, Medium, Low
- judge from urgency words, timeline, issue severity, and business need

4. ai_keywords
- comma-separated keywords
- include the most important business, pain point, requirement, or use-case terms

5. lead_score
- integer from 1 to 100
- score higher if the lead looks serious, specific, urgent, budget-aware, ready to act, or commercially valuable

6. priority
- must be exactly one of: High, Medium, Low
- use lead_score to guide this:
  - 80 to 100 = High
  - 50 to 79 = Medium
  - 1 to 49 = Low

7. suggested_reply
- internal-use reply draft
- plain text
- professional and specific
- should help the team quickly respond
- mention useful details from the lead when available

8. next_action
- one practical next step for the team
- examples: Schedule demo, Send pricing details, Request clarification, Escalate support case, Review partnership fit

9. message
- a clean CRM summary in plain text
- combine the most important details from the form
- should read like a complete lead note
- include only fields that actually have values
- make it useful for Airtable and CRM viewing

10. customer_reply_subject
- subject line for customer email
- natural, professional, and relevant to the inquiry type

11. customer_reply_html
- must be full clean HTML email body
- professional, warm, and specific
- directly address the customer by name when available
- mention the actual inquiry type
- include relevant details only if they exist
- for example include budget, team size, expected timeline, partnership type, support issue, preferred demo time, project needs, etc when relevant
- do not mention AI, lead score, internal analysis, or CRM
- do not mention missing fields
- do not include fake promises
- include a clear next step
- include a polite closing from SmartLead AI Team
- include this sentence near the end only if it fits naturally:
  "You can also review progress through our shared dashboard link when provided."
- output valid HTML as a JSON string value

Quality rules:
- Be specific, not generic.
- Do not repeat the same sentence in multiple fields.
- Keep tone business-professional.
- For support inquiries, focus on reassurance and quick resolution.
- For pricing inquiries, focus on fit, scope, and next-step discussion.
- For demo requests, focus on scheduling and what they want to see.
- For partnership inquiries, focus on alignment, goals, and timeline.
- For custom projects, focus on scope, outcomes, timeline, and budget.
- If the lead provided a preferred contact method, reflect that naturally in the customer reply when helpful.
- If the lead provided a timeline or urgency, reflect it naturally in the reply.
- If the lead provided a budget, mention it carefully and professionally when relevant.

Return JSON in exactly this structure:
{
  "ai_summary": "",
  "ai_intent": "",
  "ai_urgency": "High or Medium or Low",
  "ai_keywords": "",
  "lead_score": 0,
  "priority": "High or Medium or Low",
  "suggested_reply": "",
  "next_action": "",
  "message": "",
  "customer_reply_subject": "",
  "customer_reply_html": ""
}
}
